name: Courvoisier French Silk Chocolate Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups half and half or light cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine half and half, cornstarch, and sugar. Stir until well-blended.
2. Add semisweet chocolate and cook over low heat, stirring continuously, until chocolate is melted and mixture comes to a boil.
3. Stir one cup of hot mixture into yolks, return to pan.
4. Cook and stir for one minute. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla and Courvoisier.
5. Pour into prepared crust. Chill four hours.
6. Whip cream with two tablespoons Courvoisier until fluffy. Spread over top of pie.
7. Garnish with chocolate shavings.
